content: I have a question. To translate the Covenants more accurately, I've been looking up their context in the game (their sources, stage descriptions, art, patterns and icons of the 6-sets, etc). And apparently... some of the Covenants featured in the spreadsheet aren't even implemented in the game?

Also, if it helps, the "Scarlet Pulse" and "Crimson Embrace" descriptions actually reference Uvhash and his creator, Caligula. "Golem" in Morimens lore doesn't refer to the clay man of Kabbalah, but is an obsolete term for "Awakener", used by unsanctioned mages centuries before Mythag codified the process. Caligula was the first one to create a "Golem", said golem was Uvhash. And, well, Crimson/Scarlet, yadda yadda.

Anyway, RU translation is done. Hopefully I didn't mess up the <NAME> part.
